message:
chore: expand gitignore to cover .claude/ directory and MCP config backups

Replace the narrow .claude/settings.local.json entry with a full .claude/
directory ignore, and add a pattern for auto-generated MCP config backup
files (*.mcp.json.*.bak) created during config updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -85,7 +85,12 @@ SilverFox:
 
 # Beads history snapshots
 .beads/.br_history/
-.claude/settings.local.json
+
+# Claude Code / AI agent ephemeral files
+.claude/
+
+# MCP config backup files (auto-generated during config updates)
+*.mcp.json.*.bak
 
 # CASS session mining output
 LIST_OF_INPUT_MESSAGES.md
